content:
## Page Section / Title
Colors  
PALETTE  

## All Verbatim Text
Brand Guidelines | by Sightbox  
1.1 Colors  
PALETTE  
Color reflects our brand's personality. It not only strengthens brand recognition but also maintains visual consistency in every interaction with our audience. Always prioritize HEX colors.  
AIS BLACK # 000000  
AIS RED # FF005A  
AIS CYAN # 00E6FF  
AIS ACCENT #1 # FFAC30  
AIS ACCENT #2 # 007E72  
AIS ACCENT #3 # 004F98  
AIS ACCENT #4 # 820A7D  
AIS GRADIENT  
C0 M0 Y0 K100  
PANTONE BLACK C  
C0 M100 Y64 K0  
PANTONE 1925 C  
C70 M0 Y0 K0  
PANTONE 306 C  
AIS RED #2 # D4024D  
AIS RED #3 # B7004B  
AIS CYAN #2 # 00AFD6  
AIS CYAN #3 # 0084AC  

## Visual Elements
- **Color palette**:  
  - AIS BLACK: #000000 (solid black swatch)  
  - AIS RED: #FF005A (bright pink-red swatch)  
  - AIS CYAN: #00E6FF (bright cyan swatch)  
  - AIS ACCENT #1: #FFAC30 (vibrant orange swatch)  
  - AIS ACCENT #2: #007E72 (teal swatch)  
  - AIS ACCENT #3: #004F98 (dark blue swatch)  
  - AIS ACCENT #4: #820A7D (purple swatch)  
  - AIS GRADIENT: Horizontal gradient transitioning from pink-red to cyan  
  - PANTONE BLACK C: CMYK values C0 M0 Y0 K100 (black swatch)  
  - PANTONE 1925 C: CMYK values C0 M100 Y64 K0 (pink-red swatch)  
  - PANTONE 306 C: CMYK values C70 M0 Y0 K0 (cyan swatch)  
  - AIS RED #2: #D4024D (darker pink-red swatch)  
  - AIS RED #3: #B7004B (deepest pink-red swatch)  
  - AIS CYAN #2: #00AFD6 (darker cyan swatch)  
  - AIS CYAN #3: #0084AC (deepest cyan swatch)  

- **Typography**:  
  - Primary heading: "Colors" (bold, sans-serif, large size)  
  - Section title: "PALETTE" (uppercase, sans-serif, smaller size)  
  - Body copy: "Color reflects our brand's personality..." (regular weight, sans-serif)  
  - Color names/labels: "AIS BLACK", "AIS RED", etc. (uppercase, sans-serif)  
  - Hex values: "#000000", "#FF005A", etc. (monospaced, sans-serif)  
  - CMYK values: "C0 M0 Y0 K100" (monospaced, sans-serif)  
  - Pantone references: "PANTONE BLACK C", "PANTONE 1925 C" (uppercase, sans-serif)  

- **Layout grid**:  
  - Left sidebar: Fixed-width column containing text (header, section title, body copy)  
  - Main content area: Multi-column grid with vertical color swatches (each swatch occupies a full-height column)  
  - Gradient section: Horizontal band spanning the width of the main content area, positioned below the primary color swatches  
  - CMYK/Pantone section: Two-row grid (one row for CMYK, one for Pantone) with smaller swatches, aligned below the gradient  

- **Geometric elements**:  
  - Color swatches: Rectangular blocks with sharp edges, uniform height (full page height for primary swatches)  
  - Gradient: Smooth horizontal transition between pink-red and cyan, with no hard edges  
  - Text alignment: Left-aligned for all text in the sidebar; center-aligned for color names/labels within swatches  

## Page Layout Summary
The page is divided into two main sections:  
1. **Left sidebar**: Contains the header ("Brand Guidelines | by Sightbox"), section title ("1.1 Colors"), subtitle ("PALETTE"), and body copy explaining color usage. This sidebar is a fixed-width column with text aligned to the left.  
2. **Main content area**: Occupies the right two-thirds of the page and is structured as a multi-column grid. Primary color swatches (AIS BLACK, AIS RED, AIS CYAN, and four accent colors) are displayed as full-height vertical columns. Below these, a horizontal "AIS GRADIENT" band spans the width of the main area. Further down, a two-row grid shows smaller swatches with CMYK values (top row) and Pantone references (bottom row), aligned to the left of the main grid.  

## Design Rules / Guidance Visible on Page
- "Always prioritize HEX colors." (Explicit instruction in the body copy)  
- Color names are formatted in uppercase (e.g., "AIS BLACK", "AIS RED")  
- Hex values are displayed with a leading "#" (e.g., "#000000", "#FF005A")  
- CMYK values are listed in the format "C0 M0 Y0 K100"  
- Pantone references include the color name and "C" suffix (e.g., "PANTONE BLACK C", "PANTONE 1925 C")  
- Gradient is labeled "AIS GRADIENT" and positioned as a horizontal band below primary color swatches  
- Accent colors are numbered sequentially (AIS ACCENT #1 to #4) and displayed as vertical columns
